initial_candidates.sql:
WITH daily_volume AS (
    SELECT 
        ticker,
        txn_date,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN quantity LIKE '%K' THEN CAST(REPLACE(quantity, 'K', '') AS REAL) * 1000
                WHEN quantity LIKE '%M' THEN CAST(REPLACE(quantity, 'M', '') AS REAL) * 1000000
                WHEN quantity = '-' THEN 0
                ELSE CAST(quantity AS REAL)
            END
        ) AS total_volume
    FROM bitcoin_transactions
    WHERE txn_date >= '2021-08-01' AND txn_date <= '2021-08-10'
    GROUP BY ticker, txn_date
),
volume_with_prev AS (
    SELECT 
        ticker,
        txn_date,
        total_volume,
        LAG(total_volume) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY txn_date) AS prev_volume
    FROM daily_volume
)
SELECT 
    ticker,
    txn_date,
    CASE 
        WHEN prev_volume IS NULL OR prev_volume = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(((total_volume - prev_volume) / prev_volume) * 100, 2)
    END AS pct_change
FROM volume_with_prev
ORDER BY ticker, txn_date;
